## [00:00 - 00:19]

Payments are too high and that John is more of a reason for making a decision right now. Look, waiting has already cost you too much money. Had you done this three months ago, your payments would be $20 less. Look, you're just making it worse by waiting. Can you see that? Good. Let's get this done.
